description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a dark gray exterior and a multi-faceted brown hip roof. The house is surrounded by a light-colored wooden fence, enclosing a small yard with several trees and shrubs. The front features a covered porch area with outdoor seating and a large window, while the side yard includes a patio with additional furniture and a car parked in a driveway. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and vertical strip patterns, with some large panes and others smaller and rectangular. The overall design is modern with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and practical outdoor spaces. The property is well-defined, with clear boundaries and landscaping that enhances its urban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gray facade, brown hip roof, fenced yard, and landscaped outdoor areas including a porch, patio, and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large window, driveway with a car, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area with outdoor furniture, vertical strip windows, and dense tree coverage along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, driveway, and the continuation of the hip roof, with less visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing large windows, the patio, and a more open section of the yard with visible trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large panes
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single main door, large window, and minimal decorative elements
